name: Greek Burrito Snack Wrap
method: In a wide nonstick saucepan over medium heat, add the oil; add the
Lessen heat and add and cook, scraping the skillet's bottom and sides
with a spatula as the mixture starts to shape big, soft curds.
Cook, constantly stirring, until the eggs have thickened to your liking.
Tzatziki sauce should be spread down the middle of each tortilla,
leaving a 1 ½ -inch (2.5 cm) border at the left and right sides.
Add fried egg combination, onions, and feta cheese on top.
Cover the bottom of the flatbread over the stuffing, then pull in the
sides; load up firmly from the edge.
